title: Bass and Macaroni Comfort Casserole
description: A comforting casserole dish featuring sea bass and macaroni, perfect for a cozy night in.
instructions: Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente.
In a separate saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to combine, cooking for 1 minute.
Gradually add the milk, whisking continuously, until the sauce thickens.
Stir in 1/2 cup of cheddar cheese until melted.
In a large skillet, cook the sea bass fillets over medium-high heat until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Transfer the cooked macaroni to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Pour the cheese sauce over the macaroni and top with the cooked sea bass fillets.
Sprinkle the remaining cheddar cheese and parmesan cheese on top.
Dot the top with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
